title: First Canadian Astronaut Will Travel to the Moon Amid Fraying U.S.-Canada Relations
summary_full: Canada will send its first astronaut to the moon on a joint mission with the United States, but back on Earth, the relationship between the two countries is fraying.
summary_public: Canada will send its first astronaut to the moon on a joint mission with the United States, but back on Earth, the relationship between the two countries is fraying.
